overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail through lush summer vegetation. The character travels from a dense rocky forest path to an open mountain valley and finally reaches a lakeside shore with crystal clear water.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a narrow dirt path bordered by a rocky cliff wall on the left and dense vegetation on the right

entered.detail: Large gray rock formation covered with patches of moss and small plants
Dense pine and fir trees covering the mountain slopes ahead
Lush grass with scattered red, yellow and purple wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow forest trail winding through dense summer vegetation. A rocky cliff face looms on the left while wildflowers dot the grassy verge on the right. The character walks forward through dappled sunlight filtering through the coniferous canopy.

events.description: path emerges from shadow into direct sunlight, revealing distant mountain peaks

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail as the forest opens up to reveal mountain vistas ahead

entered.detail: Distant mountain peaks partially covered with white clouds against blue sky

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up as the camera moves into direct sunlight, revealing majestic mountain peaks rising in the distance. The rocky cliff falls away to the left, replaced by more forested slopes, while the path continues through tall grass and scattered pines toward the valley ahead.

events.description: forest gives way to open valley as a turquoise lake comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the lake shore with weapons visible on back, approaching the water's edge

entered.detail: Clear turquoise alpine lake visible in the valley ahead, surrounded by forested shores

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens into a wide mountain valley where a pristine turquoise lake becomes visible ahead. The path descends slightly toward the water's edge, with the forest thinning out to reveal rocky mountain slopes on the right and the forested shoreline across the lake.

events.description: reaching the lakeshore where wooden planks and debris are scattered on the ground

agents.ego_description: approaching the water's edge and walking along the shoreline examining the clear water and wooden remains

entered.detail: Scattered broken wooden planks and logs on the shore, remnants of a structure or dock

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the lakeshore where the water appears crystal clear and turquoise. Wooden debris and planks are scattered along the beach to the left, suggesting a ruined dock or shelter. The path continues along the water's edge with forested mountains rising on the far side of the lake.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, shaded forest trail that gradually opens into a vast, sun-drenched mountain valley and lakeside shore. It begins on a narrow path winding through dense summer vegetation and dappled sunlight, with a rocky cliff face looming to the left. As the camera moves forward, the canopy thins and the trail opens into direct sunlight, revealing majestic mountain peaks rising in the distance as the rocky cliff gives way to forested slopes. The scene then expands into a wide valley where the forest recedes to reveal a pristine turquoise lake, with the path descending toward the water's edge. Finally, the camera reaches the crystal clear shoreline, passing scattered wooden debris and ruined planks on the beach while forested mountains rise across the water.
